sub_modules.bpf_coeff_const: Purely combinational constant-coefficient provider with the exact hard-coded 101-tap signed FIR coefficient set.
sub_modules.bpf_tap_product: Purely combinational signed multiplier for one delayed input sample and one FIR coefficient, producing a 64-bit product.
sub_modules.bpf_adder_tree_sum: Purely combinational accumulator that sums all flattened 64-bit tap products into one 64-bit FIR accumulation result.
sub_modules.bpf_output_quantizer: Purely combinational fixed-point output scaler that arithmetic-right-shifts the 64-bit accumulator by 15 and returns the configured output width.
